title: epistemic-active-calibration: Terminal Controllability in Task-Compatible Active Calibration
description: Simulation code for the paper "When Identifiability Is Not Enough: Terminal Controllability in Task-Compatible Active Calibration" (IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters, manuscript 26-2166). Includes the planar redundant-arm active-calibration stress test, finite-step task-compatible probing, terminal rollout-risk diagnostics, and the self-contained KUKA LBR iiwa 7-DoF case study.
